inputs.label: Heat Duty
inputs.businessContext: Required thermal power to be transferred

inputs.label: Overall Heat Transfer Coefficient
inputs.businessContext: Combined conductive and convective heat transfer coefficient

inputs.label: Hot Fluid Inlet Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Temperature of hot fluid entering the exchanger

inputs.label: Hot Fluid Outlet Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Temperature of hot fluid leaving the exchanger

inputs.label: Cold Fluid Inlet Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Temperature of cold fluid entering the exchanger

inputs.label: Cold Fluid Outlet Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Temperature of cold fluid leaving the exchanger

formulas.lmtd: Math.abs(deltaT1 - deltaT2) < 1e-10 ? deltaT1 : (deltaT1 - deltaT2) / Math.log(deltaT1 / deltaT2)
